_fixture_note: Synthetic browser-oracle trace for the Blockchain.com blog *index* (not the IPO post). The point of this fixture is the negative case: even with a full browser session, the index hydrates a list of post stubs but DOES NOT carry the IPO post body. The distiller should *not* propose a confident static operator for the IPO body from this trace; it should emit a RememberedAbsence saying 'this trace did not include the IPO post body' so future ticks don't waste a browser fallback on the wrong URL.
captureNotes: Synthetic fixture. Index page only — the post body the AF was looking for is not present in any captured request.
